title: Pre-Mortem
use_when: Use when stress-testing a PRD, launch plan, product bet, or feature to support a go/no-go, hold, defer, reduce-scope, continue/kill, or mitigation-priority decision.
do_not_use_when: Do not use when the product has already launched and the team needs post-launch analysis, or when the request is only bug triage.
output_artifact: Pre-mortem go/no-go decision report with failure modes, decision-making risk audit, mitigations, and recommendation
framework_fit: Best when the product work is explicitly about decision making and the requested method fits Pre-Mortem.
failure_modes: Produces Pre-mortem go/no-go decision report with failure modes, decision-making risk audit, mitigations, and recommendation without tying recommendations to the user's Plan stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Pre-Mortem as generic Decision Making advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Pre-Mortem when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $pre-mortem before our beta launch go/no-go decision to identify failure modes, decision biases, mitigations, and whether to launch, hold, defer, or reduce scope.
examples.expected_artifact: Pre-mortem go/no-go decision report with failure modes, decision-making risk audit, mitigations, and recommendation
